preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: There is an open funnel towards the tunnel.

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to throw a little Fireball, right there where those guys are.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, you guys you all hit from this distance because goblins are puny little things. They're still a little small to see, but you're all pretty well trained and pretty honed with your aim. You fire simultaneously, gunshot echo through the hallway, arrows, flying dagger, you see three goblins fall off a nearby dwarf who goes, "Thank--" At which point a large fireball explodes, killing off about ten or so of the goblins and probably two of the dwarves.

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: Sorry about that!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: The guards stopped.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Did you do that?

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Fuck.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: They they start looking around and they see you pull out your weapons and they all take a step back and realize they don't want to die either. "Well go, if you're going to help, go!"

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: We run straight in.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: With you guys charging in, you can now see a handful more goblins are rushing out. They are like running really fast, sprinting.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I throw Entangle up, in the distance wherever they're coming from.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, what's the radius on that?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Like a hundred feet.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That's the range. What is the radius?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, 20-foot radius.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. You find a portion of the central point where the things exit from the tunnel and these strange reddish vines begin to protrude and to begin to grab nearby goblins and pull them up in this massive, weird vine creature. You hear (stomping) and you now see two larger ogre-like creatures come storming out.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, shit!

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: Wonderful!

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Okay, cool. So that creates a sphere of a 20-foot radius of silence here. So he goes and he does like a hand motion. Nothing happens. Frustrated, he continues to run. I'm going to have you guys roll initiative.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. As you are beginning to go through his body, you guys have rushed beneath, and as you can see, the dwarf, Hosin, is walking down the hallway really quickly with his robes open.

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: As a gadfly, can I really quickly buzz in front of him?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You pull underneath, because you had to go underneath the door to make it into the hallway. You see him, he's about 15 feet away, and as he's walking, he's looking about very nervously. He's seen one of the guards is approaching, and he looks back over and sees the rat scurrying down the hallway.

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: How far away is he from me?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: He's about 20 feet.

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: How far away is the guard in front of him?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You know what, let me go ahead and pull this up. It'll give a good indicator of the circumstance here.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: He does what?

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: Oh god, we have a map.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Gentlemen, we need to move.

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: Okay, so he's right there.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Mama Cass, what have you found?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right, you guys are currently inspecting him at the moment, as you guys are rushing through.

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: Oh! So I'm within 20 feet of him, whatever?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Actually no, he'd be back here. He's just rushing past. So he's 20 to 25 feet from you.

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: Okay. Ah. I'm going to dispel Polymorph, and I'm going to cast Silence in front of him. I'm going to silence him.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. All right, so you're using him as the source?

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: Yes.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. So as you un-Polymorph, he looks over his shoulder and sees you take this form, you go ahead and cast Silence, which has an opposition. What level spell is that? 2nd-level?

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: Yes. I believe so.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: So I'll have you guys roll initiative, as well.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You know what, let me go ahead and pull this up. It'll give a good indicator of the circumstance here.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION

preceding_turns.text: Okay. Ah. I'm going to dispel Polymorph, and I'm going to cast Silence in front of him. I'm going to silence him.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. All right, so you're using him as the source?

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: Yes.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. So as you un-Polymorph, he looks over his shoulder and sees you take this form, you go ahead and cast Silence, which has an opposition. What level spell is that? 2nd-level?

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: Yes. I believe so.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Fucking shit. 17.

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: Sorry. What is that? 17.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 17 and 17. All right. So you guys will both be going first, but before we finish that, as you guys are searching the body you hear all of a sudden the sound of some sort of scuffle, a flash of some sort of energy in the hallway that's muffled between the doorway, and footsteps also happening. As you're just starting to get through his pockets you start hearing some sort of a scuffle outside of the room.

preceding_turns.speaker: WIL
preceding_turns.text: I'm gone.

preceding_turns.speaker: WILL
preceding_turns.text: Me, too.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Okay. You step forward and take a good long look at the fog that is slowly beginning to form at the base of the tunnel you guys are in. As you lean forward and take it in, the fog begins to form into a physical humanoid essence and reach out for you. For the three that are conscious, roll initiative.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I'm pretty sure he just said bagel.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Bagel?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All righty. So, you guys take first watch, rest is till about 11PM or midnight or so. You guys finish. Who's taking second watch? All right, we've got Grog and Vax. All right so, you guys--

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: While Percival is sleeping, I pull Grog over and we look at him for a while, and I say, where do you think the smoke comes out of?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Oh, that's a good question.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Do you think it's the nostrils?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: No, it looked like it was coming from the bottom up, and there's only two holes down there, so it's either--

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, that's right.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Either the dirt button--

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: It could just be his pores. You're right, it's probably--

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: It's probably the periscope. You're right.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: As you guys are having this conversation, the air down here, it's damp earth. It's chilled in the night, anyway, but it's a little warmer because you're under the ground, and it's absorbed some of the heat of the day. But it is getting noticeably colder.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: It's getting colder?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, just as the evening progresses. The temperature at night here--

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Colder than it did last night? Because it also got pretty cold last night.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Comparable, yeah. There's a low mist begins to form within the tunnel from the temperature.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I wake up my sister.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: What, what do you want?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: There's fog or something. What's going on?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: It's just cold.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Can we see if it's magic?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Make an insight check.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Do that thing again. You can tell when stuff's around.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh good, I rolled a one.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Can I do a nature check to show them it's just fucking fog?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, go ahead and roll.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Okay, no damage. It's just going to grab you. And it goes in to attempt to go through your throat. You being prepared for this, having been subjected to this once before, you bring a dagger up towards its face and it just barely manages to pull out of the way before you thrust it up through the bottom of its neck. You manage to deflect the attack. All right, the people who just woke up, roll initiative, please.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Misses.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Misses. You slap aside with your hand as you still try to pull the warhammer out of the wall, and then it gets clotheslined by the grip you have on it. It's going to try to strike you with its claws for the second attack. That's a ten. Yeah, no.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Misses.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You (swish) out of its way, laughing in its face. The one against you, Percy, where you're on the ground prone. Oh okay, that'll be an 18?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm an 18.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It grabs you by the front of your shit and lifts you up with that hissing sound. Yeah, that'll be a 25. It pulls you in and sinks its fangs into the side of your throat. You can feel yourself gasp out in pain as the cold sensation pulses through your body, the actual life's blood being drained from you. Okay, you take four points of piercing damage, and you take eight points of necrotic damage, and your maximum hit points are reduced by eight.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I forgot I have advantage on strength checks when I'm raging.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Roll again.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: A one.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Wow, really?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: It's as if the gods defy you.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So you're now grappled and held there. It's pulling the blood out of your throat, you're caught off guard and completely just confused, frightened, and in serious pain at this moment. All right, and the one that's Hunter's Marked, that's against you. It's going to attempt to grab you. That's a 20?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, that works.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Initiative has now kicked in; I need everyone to roll initiative. (laughs)

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Crunch.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: The ground gives out from under them, they both go, (screams) and fall into a pit here.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh shit!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: See, aren't you glad that wasn't me?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. Good job.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Couldn't have gone with the will o' the wisp.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: A pit?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: They would have floated right above it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: This whole section here has now crumpled below. The dryads, however, have to make a save.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh my god.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: One of them saves.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: But that wasn't us!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: That wasn't us!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That wasn't you guys. Like right there? Okay!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Wasn't me! It's all I care about!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: This is the most Douglas Adams beginning of a fight ever.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: One dryad dies a horrible screaming death. (screams) And the other one you hear is breathing heavily from the inside right now.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Keyleth is standing at the edge of the forest going--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: At which point, a bunch of the orcs turn around. I need both of you guys to-- let's see, because they're making active perception. What was your stealth check, Sam?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: 15, but it doesn't matter. I'm walking forward.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: (chuckles) Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to cast the Resilient Sphere on myself. And I'm going to roll into camp. Hamster-style.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Wait, can I go with you a little bit?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Don't.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Can I do a thing with him?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: If he says don't, then--

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Then probably don't.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: No, let him do his thing. It's marble madness, everybody.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to start singing to get their attention. (sings 'Tro-lo-lo')

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Just avoid the pit!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right. All 60 feet, you avoid the pit, you roll around, all the orcs look over. "Huh? Stupid gnome!"

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Very stupid.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Hello. Osysa sent us.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It mounts itself there, turns so it's facing both you and the rest of you as you all approach. "You, you seek power, glory, retribution. I know your quarry, and I know your goal. She has told me. I can show you. But all great knowledge should not be given. You must be proven. It must be earned. It must be EARNED." And as his voice roars, the room echoes and you can see wind begin to whip all around you. Glancing over your shoulder, you guys can see now the empty pit in the center of the hall behind you is now whipping into a whirlwind and what appears to be a small centralized cyclone that's now rising up, meeting the ceiling, staying stationary in place, arcing there. The braziers flame up even brighter now, the flames, you can feel the heat even from your distance at this point. You can see now the sphinx is baring its gleaming white teeth there at the top. "What. Is. My. Name?"

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Fuck.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: 12, yeah. The fear still strikes in your heart. All right. Vax, that's the end of your turn. All right. I need everybody in here to go ahead and reroll initiative as the time flux in the room all of a sudden flickers and time seems to shift and move. Everyone reroll initiative.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: There's nothing on it, nothing to do. I'm going to throw three daggers through the web. Is that the one-- so Percy's over there? I'm going to throw three daggers through the web over there.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, go for it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right, what was it? Sorry, it was?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right, the second two hit, so go ahead and roll damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Ten and eight.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Ten and eight. All right. You throw two and it cuts a few threads and the path of it falls limp but the web stays up.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: And I can't move any closer to the sphinx at this point, right, because of the fear?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Correct.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: So I'm stuck here, am I?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, you can't move any closer to it right now. But you can make a saving throw at the end of your turn to try--

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I will do that. I'd also like to take one step to the right.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: One step to the right? All right.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: This way, yeah. And no, I rolled an eight for wisdom.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, so you're still in the fear effect. All right. By the way, Grog, go ahead and make a saving throw to resist the effect so it's gone, even though you--

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Oh, at disadvantage?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Which saving throw?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It's wisdom.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: (laughs) Five.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right, you're still under the effect. And Scanlan, actually, roll it again.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Oh, but I'm raging.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Right, you resist, I mean, it doesn't affect you but it still persists.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Got you.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: If you stopped raging then the fear would kick in.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Is this a saving throw?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: This is wisdom.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: And do I still get advantage or no, because the first time it's cast.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You would, I'd say, sure.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: The old man's body stops quaking, his flesh now grey and mangled like an ancient tree trunk. He turns, his eyes blood-red and bulging, his lips curled into a horrifying grimace. The two Crown's Guard begin to try and make their way through the panicked crowd, but the people, like a wave of chaos, are keeping them at bay. I need everyone to roll initiative. (yelling)

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I invoke Duplicity.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You watch as her form suddenly dissipates into multiple seemingly copies of her form as Jester.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yasha? We're going to need those weapons back.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I turn to Mollymauk and go, man, I thought it was kind of lame at first, but this is awesome!

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Everyone get out right now.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: This isn't part of the show?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Not part of the show.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: It's too artsy.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Jester, you make your way up over to that side. The rest of you are currently trying to catch up on that end of the table. That being the case, I need everyone to roll initiative.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Don't worry, we'll save you! There's a thing, and it's trapped and there's the reptile thing that's going to eat it!

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Where? Which direction?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Over there. I point and I start climbing over and try to get to it.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Do we even see her anymore?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You see her in the tree, you don't see what she's looking at and pointing at. She climbs down the tree and begins running in that direction.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: It's about 100 feet away. Don't worry.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Don't worry? What?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: What?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: She's ran off.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Shit.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Fuck. I'll run off after her.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Same.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: What are we saving?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I don't know. Right now, we're saving Jester.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I'm still on a horse, yeah? I'm on a horse.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You are, yeah. You're staying on your horse to get there?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, I'm staying on my horse!

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: You're going to hard tax your horse?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: (galloping) How cool is that?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Well, it's cool for the first minute before it goes (mud slurping).

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Guiding Bolt is an attack thing, so I have to roll to attack.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Oh, got you. Roll to attack.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, no. Okay, it definitely hits. It's plus seven, 16, 23.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, that hits. All right, cool. So timeline worked out.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yay!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: As you approach, this is the visual from the side that you see.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yay, map time!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I'm so glad we checked out what it was.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: (beatboxing)

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh shit!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: So many trees.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh my god, look at all these trees.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Damn.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: This here is the gator that you see making its way there. It is very large.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh no, it's really big. Look at that teeny little bird guy.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: All right, I need you guys to roll initiative.

preceding_turns.speaker: DEBORAH
preceding_turns.text: While Twiggy does this, she sticks her tongue out the side of her mouth and one eye closed.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It appears to be unlocked.

preceding_turns.speaker: DEBORAH
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Let's open it.

preceding_turns.speaker: DEBORAH
preceding_turns.text: We both take each one and open up the cabinet.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, you open the inside of the cabinet, and it is empty.

preceding_turns.speaker: DEBORAH
preceding_turns.text: I don't buy it.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Let's feel around, wiggle around.

preceding_turns.speaker: DEBORAH
preceding_turns.text: We stick our hands in.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay! You put your hands inside the empty cabinet, and it immediately closes on your arms as teeth suddenly emerge from the sides of the door. (yelling, groaning)

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Shut up!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: No, actually, this is an attack on each of you. Oh, that's cocked. Okay, that is 23 against you.

preceding_turns.speaker: DEBORAH
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: And that is 17 against you.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Hits.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right. Each of you suffer 14 points of piercing damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Uncanny dodge.

preceding_turns.speaker: DEBORAH
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, uncanny dodge.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Both of you take seven points of piercing damage, but you are both currently grappled as it is slammed on your arms in a very The Thing kind of way, like when the guy's chest opens and closes. Yeah, it's some John Carpenter. It closes on you and you see on each of the doors where the striations of the wood are, they split and you see these eyes peek through at you.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I immediately turn around and Invoke Duplicity down on the ground near them.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. All right, that Invoke Duplicity appears. Where do you want her to be?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Right next to them.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, yeah, so you guys are both up here right now.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Mm-hmm.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: For Pete's-- Sacred Flame.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: He thinks for a second to himself. "Time does move strangely chamber to chamber here. If he is, well, I guess that makes me lord of the manor."

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Oh no.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You hear another-- (footsteps)

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Manor? Are we in a house?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "More or less." (footsteps) "If you can call the hundred or so chambers here a house."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Jeez. You know, I hate to leave you without a friend. I mean, if this guy's up and left you high and dry, maybe I could offer my services.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Make a persuasion check. Roll fucking high.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: He goes, "Huh. I appreciate the offer, but I tend to work solo and let's be honest, I'm hungry." There are a few flashes from the center of the above hallway as a few bodies fall through. Beau and Jester both come falling through, Bill and Ted style. Both of you guys make acrobatics checks for me.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I was trying to draw that shit out--

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Natural 20!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You three-point land.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: You're good! 12!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You three-point land. (bones cracking) (screams)

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: You have no idea how happy I am to see you. Dragon!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Five point of bludgeoning damage to you. As you land, the dragon rears up, caught off guard, wings up in the air. I'm going to pull the map out. (cheering)

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh my god. D&D Beyond.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Oh boy.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: This feels like a lot.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Damn it. Ooh!

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Turn it around this way. Oh boy.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: For this, Jester landed there. Fjord-- sorry, Beau is prone there.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I started to take a step to the left while facing the dragon.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: And the dragon is right there.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Okay. The minute he rears up, I'm going to Invoke Duplicity again.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Yeah, it is concentration, so you're considered concentrating right now. It's friendly to you and your companions. Roll initiative for the elemental.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: No. Blink was my action.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Correct, but at the end of each of your turns--

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Oh, I do. I roll. Yep. That is 11.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: On 11 or higher, you vanish from the current plane. That's where you were. You disappear. That ends your go. Beau, you're up. You're on the ground. Looking around, there's a dragon there. Fjord turns this way and vanishes. There's two of these darkened hallways. What are you doing?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I turn to Jester and I go  Fjord just fucking vanished again! And I go: I don't know how this works! I take out the red elemental gem that I've had for a very long time, and I... use it. I was going to say I smash it, but then I felt that might be deeply irresponsible because then it could just smash.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Maybe you can punch him with the gem.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Punch the gem at him.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Badminton.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Red elemental gem. A fire elemental is summoned as if you cast the Conjure Elemental spell, and the gem's magic is lost. So as you throw it, it shatters. I don't have a fire elemental thing on me, so we'll use this for the time being. As you throw it, it breaks on the ground there. Suddenly, rising from the impact, the flames swirl and build up into a full-fledged fire elemental beneath.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I go  Fuck him up!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: As for the Conjure Elemental spell, let's see if it gets its action right now.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Just hope it listens to what you say.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: God, well, I think it's one of those things where, if something bad happens, it turns on us.

preceding_turns.speaker: DEBORAH
preceding_turns.text: I think it does. I think it's concentration.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, if I lose concentration, but I don't know--

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Yeah, so we'll say both of you guys drop. Both of you roll initiative. First of all, acrobatics check.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: It would kill me.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: (screaming) Oh, Matthew!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Why would you do this to Deborah Ann Woll?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I'm sorry I touched the window!

preceding_turns.speaker: DEBORAH
preceding_turns.text: Deborah Ann Woll has a plan! Get to where I fall in! I'm still in inter-dimensional space!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: You said 57 damage?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Correct.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: 52 damage?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 52 damage. No, I'm sorry, 55.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Maybe we can give it the rotten drug fruit that we have.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It's going to then fly back around to get a better area. This is actually going to take up in the air.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: How high is the ceiling in here?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: The ceiling is 20 feet, so it gets to max at the very top. It's ten feet above anybody, so it's out of melee range unless somebody can get to the top.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Wow. This is bad.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Boom! Ah!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I have evasion. That's the only reason I'm okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Wait, that seems much higher than 20 feet.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It's 20 feet. It's right there.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: It's hovering above. Thanks.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: The mini looks like it's flying when it's not. Now it's flying. It's at the base level.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm with you now.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: The fire elemental does get an attack of opportunity as it moves out of its range. Shrugs it off.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Okay. Yes, it hits. I rolled a 17.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 17 just misses.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: No, a natural 17 plus six.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It does hit. Roll damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: 17 misses?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: The flames are burning around its body. It doesn't even pay attention.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Get me the fuck out of here. We're level seven. Why did we do this?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: You did it!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Ten damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Ten damage. Not bad. That's top of the round, so (approaching screams). Next up, I believe, was it Caduceus first?

preceding_turns.speaker: DEBORAH
preceding_turns.text: Did you go first, and then I went after you?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I think we went-- we may have--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: In the same round.

preceding_turns.speaker: DEBORAH
preceding_turns.text: Same round, yeah.
